parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--选择课程用例的顺序图

actor 教师 as Teacher
actor 系统 as System
participant 课程信息 as CourseInfo
participant 选课信息 as SelectionInfo
participant 实验信息 as ExperimentInfo
participant 评分细则信息 as GradingRuleInfo
participant 实验评分信息 as ExperimentGradingInfo

activate Teacher
Teacher -> System : 发起评分请求
activate System
System -> CourseInfo : 查询本学期当前教师所教授的课程
activate CourseInfo
CourseInfo --> System : 返回课程信息
deactivate CourseInfo
System --> Teacher : 返回课程信息

Teacher -> System : 选择需要评分的课程
System -> SelectionInfo : 查询选择本课程的学生信息
activate SelectionInfo
SelectionInfo --> System : 返回学生信息
deactivate SelectionInfo
System --> Teacher : 返回学生信息

loop
    Teacher -> System : 选择需要评分的学生
    System -> ExperimentInfo : 查询当前课程的实验信息
    activate ExperimentInfo
    ExperimentInfo --> System : 返回当前课程的实验信息
    deactivate ExperimentInfo
    
    System -> GradingRuleInfo : 查询每个实验的评分细则信息
    activate GradingRuleInfo
    GradingRuleInfo --> System : 返回评分细则信息
    deactivate GradingRuleInfo
    
    System -> ExperimentGradingInfo : 查询本学生当前课程已被评分的细则信息
    activate ExperimentGradingInfo
    ExperimentGradingInfo --> System : 返回信息
    
    System --> Teacher : 返回本学生当前课程的实验信息
    
    Teacher -> System : 进行评分
    System -> ExperimentGradingInfo : 存储评分
    ExperimentGradingInfo --> System : 存储成功
    deactivate ExperimentGradingInfo
    
    System -> SelectionInfo : 统计课程总分数
    activate SelectionInfo
    SelectionInfo --> System : 统计成功
    deactivate SelectionInfo
    
    System --> Teacher : 评分成功
end

deactivate System
deactivate Teacher

@enduml
```
